underlying_goal: Set up a local PostgreSQL database with schema design for a distributed alarm signal receiver system (ticket AR-14), including Docker Compose, sqlc/goose tooling, migrations, and ER diagram visualization
friction_detail: Claude did too much for the user (prompting a 'stop doing things for me' request), dbdiagram.io export failed due to proprietary syntax, and DBeaver required fixing a Java version mismatch; the AI-generated PRD was also a source of frustration describing the wrong architecture.
brief_summary: User worked through database setup for an alarm receiver system (Docker Compose, goose/sqlc, schema design, ER visualization) and mostly achieved their goals despite PRD quality issues and some tooling friction.
